gaps: AdminResourcesTab missing data-bubble-id markers on IR resource card tag/flag/action entities (ai_RNbBHYaA–ai_RNbBHYaG, ai_RNbBHYZz)
Edit path/resource buttons are placeholder toasts — no update popup or Supabase update path
No crisis-resource flag row (ai_RNbBHYaM/ai_RNbBHYaO) on admin resource cards
fetchAdminPaths returns only DB rows when path table is non-empty — static ALL_PATHS catalog dropped (may diverge from Bubble combined catalog + custom)

critiques.finding: Item title/scope promises CRUD workflows but edit buttons only emit 'future iteration' toasts — violates functional-review-rubric placeholder rule for in-scope update flow.
critiques.alternative: Reuse AddPathPopup/AddResourcePopup in edit mode with pre-filled form and updateAdminPath/updateAdminResource Supabase calls.

critiques.finding: AdminResourcesTab card internals lack the bubble-id depth that AdminPathsTab achieved; IR tags-row and flags-row groups are flattened into one badge strip.
critiques.alternative: Mirror AdminPathsTab structure: wrap badges in ai_RNbBHYaA/ai_RNbBHYaI groups, mark ai_RNbBHYaB/aC/aL badges, and stamp edit/delete with ai_RNbBHYaE/ai_RNbBHYaG.

critiques.finding: Admin sub-tab buttons use generic shadcn variants rather than resolving in-scope style_ref entries from ir/slices/styles.json.
critiques.alternative: Apply bubbleStyle or dedicated tab-button classes mapped from styles.json tab button definitions.

critiques.finding: adminResourcesApi duplicates STATIC_FALLBACK seed data and onboarding_data fallback patterns already present in frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsResourcesApi.ts — drift risk between user-facing paths library and admin console.
critiques.alternative: Extract shared resource list helpers or have admin APIs delegate read path to pathsResourcesApi with admin-specific write wrappers.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight is present with reuse_decision extend and correctly cites pathsResourcesApi.ts, but mapped_target_files is empty and implementer coverage claimed 100% / functional_ok without auditing edit stubs.
critiques.alternative: Fill mapped_target_files in coverage and treat implement coverage claims as hypotheses until reviewer code+IR pass.
